exerciseDetail.title: Exercise Details
exerciseDetail.focusOn: Focus on your {{target}} throughout the movement. Keep controlled form and a full range of motion.
exerciseDetail.advancedTip: This is a demanding exercise — warm up thoroughly and use a spotter if needed.
exerciseDetail.beginnerTip: Great exercise for beginners. Focus on form over weight.
exerciseDetail.intermediateTip: Maintain moderate tempo and avoid locking joints at the top.

api.a_focused_upper_body_day_using_heavy_com: A focused upper-body day using heavy compound lifts to maximise strength and muscle mass across the chest, back and shoulders.
